rows.itemTitle: FRANCHISOR ASSISTANCE ADVERTISING COMPUTER SYSTEMS AND TRAINING

No change to core contractual obligations, but disclosure scope and investment magnitude are meaningfully expanded.

They may either complete their State’s accredited program, the ServSafe program, or other ANSI (American National Standards Institute) rated Food Manager level certification program.

rows.itemTitle: FRANCHISOR ASSISTANCE ADVERTISING COMPUTER SYSTEMS AND TRAINING
rows.summary: The franchisor significantly strengthened franchisee obligations in Item 11: (1) replaced 'initial training program' with two distinct, longer, and more prescriptive programs—'New Owner Training' (up to 40 hours) and 'Center Director Training' (up to 40 hours), each with new timing windows and certification requirements; (2) increased local advertising requirement from greater of $1,000/month or 2.0% of Gross Sales to greater of $1,000 community-based + $500 digital/month or 3.0% of Gross Sales; (3) added cost-containment language to the IT Fee clause, limiting future increases to actual cost increases plus up to 10% overhead; (4) updated Marketing Fund spending percentages from 2023 to 2024 data (52%/48% vs prior 22%/71%), reflecting a major reallocation toward production; (5) changed terminology from 'advertising and marketing plan' to 'marketing strategy' throughout.

oldEvidence.quote: We will conduct an initial training program. For more details on training, please refer to the “Training” subheading below. (Franchise Agreement, Section 4.1); and
you must spend the greater of $1,000 per month or 2.0% of Gross Sales per month to advertise and promote your Franchised Business
The IT Fee is currently .75% of Gross Sales from the preceding month, with a minimum of $500 per month and maximum of $1,500 per month but is subject to change upon 30 days advance written notice.

newEvidence.quote: We will conduct a new owner training program. For more details on training, please refer to the “Training” subheading below. (Franchise Agreement, Section 4.1); and

you must spend, beginning 60 days before you commence operations, the greater of $1,000 per month on community-based marketing and a minimum of $500 per month on digital marketing, or 3.0% of Gross Sales per month

The IT Fee is currently .75% of Gross Sales from the preceding month, with a minimum of $500 per month and maximum of $1,500 per month but is subject to change upon 30 days advance written notice. Any increase will be limited to the increase in our actual costs and expenses related to the provision of the IT Fee plus up to a 10% increase for any overhead or administrative expenses that we may incur.
